title: Joytale Light Up Dog Collar, Flashing LED for Night Walking, Rechargeable Glow Collars for Puppy Small Medium and Large Dogs, Blue
features: High Visibility at Night: You could instantly spot and keep track of your dog with the bright lights. It works perfectly in the dark, dog parks, camping, forests, yards, and outdoors. Night walking would be safe

One Size Fits All: The dog collar is easy to size with a maximum length of 70cm, just getting a pair of scissors and cut it to the appropriate length. It is sturdy, lightweight, easy to use, fits any pet
Type-C Charging Port: The light up dog collar is easy to charge with Type-C cable. With 30 minutes charging, could flash for about 4-5 continuous hours. No batteries to buy
3 Different Light Settings- Fast blink, slow blink and solid light. You can choose the flashing mode or steady light by pressing the on/off switch
Cool and Fashionable- Your dog will catch a lot of attention when walking them. LED glow makes the dog hip and modern, would also be a nice gift
